name: Zucchini Bread (the Best Ever!)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease two small loaf pans.
3. Sift together flour, salt, cinnamon, baking soda, and baking powder.
4. In a large bowl, whisk together oil, eggs, vanilla, and sugar.
5. Stir in the flour mixture and remaining ingredients.
6. Divide the batter into prepared pans.
7. Bake for 55-60 minutes or until a cake tester comes out clean.
8. Cool on wire racks to room temperature.
